notes: WIN-055 verdict change (pending-human). tldr_verdict text patch self-applied. See EXP-295-P5.

patches.find: Standard candles confirm Hubble's Law; the dome has no redshift mechanism. The values are textbook physics.
patches.replace: Cepheid and SBF distance ladders place galaxies at 10–100 Mpc, orders of magnitude beyond the dome’s 9,086 km firmament. The WIN cites them as confirmation while the dome’s own commitments deny the spatial framework in which the measurements occur.
patches.rationale: EXP-295-P5-WIN-055-verdict: update tldr_verdict to match SC framing. Curmudgeon WIN-055.c3 endorses (confidence 0.88). Verdict change (Misleading→Self-Contradicted) left for human.

EXP-295-P5-WIN-055-verdict: curmudgeon endorses SC reclassification (WIN-055.c3, confidence 0.88). Blocker: verify 8,619 km error in EXP-295 proposed_subsection_html is not propagated to any published page before applying. The Part 6.13 subsection has not been integrated yet so no published error exists.
